route_observations.observation: Sixteen content-addressed official year pages contain 108 unique Statement links: 98 in scheduled Meeting sections and 10 in Conference Call sections. M3 excludes the conference-call links.

Minutes and transcripts can contain record-level release times, but planned or customary 2:15 p.m. language cannot substitute for actual publication time. Historical exceptions demonstrate that a uniform time backfill is forbidden.
The official archive exposes dated TXT/PDF releases and the sample release contains an actual release date and time. The old annual schedule HTTP 403 is not evidence that CPI history is unavailable.

The official archive exposes dated TXT/PDF releases and the sample release contains an actual release date and time. Historical delays and exceptional publication times require release-by-release reconciliation.
Official materials support the standard third-Friday rule and selected exceptions, but do not yet establish a complete versioned 1994-2009 event and holiday-exception identity.

mechanism_qualification.name: FOMC_NEXT_SESSION_OPEN_TO_CLOSE_REACTION
mechanism_qualification.blocker: All 98 scheduled statement identities must be frozen and at least 94 must receive accepted record-level actual publication timestamps. Planned or customary times are not accepted actual timestamps.

mechanism_qualification.name: CPI_PRE_RELEASE_NEGATIVE_CONTROL
mechanism_qualification.blocker: Materialize the complete 1994-2009 official release archive, preserve raw byte hashes and retrieval timestamps, and reconcile revisions, delays and exceptional release times before freezing the denominator.

mechanism_qualification.name: NFP_PRE_RELEASE_NEGATIVE_CONTROL
mechanism_qualification.blocker: Materialize the complete 1994-2009 official release archive, preserve raw byte hashes and retrieval timestamps, and reconcile revisions, delays and exceptional release times before freezing the denominator.

mechanism_qualification.name: MONTHLY_OPTIONS_EXPIRATION
mechanism_qualification.blocker: The current dates are deterministic rule-derived candidates, not accepted historical event identities. Complete official versioned rule and holiday-exception coverage remains required.

mechanism_qualification.name: QUARTERLY_OPTIONS_FUTURES_EXPIRATION
mechanism_qualification.blocker: The current dates are deterministic rule-derived candidates, not accepted historical event identities. Options and equity-index futures identities must both be official and historically versioned.

calendar_qualification.blocker: SPY date parity cannot substitute for official 1994-2009 XNYS holiday, ad-hoc closure and early-close identity.

adjudication.next_external_review_question: Does this artifact accurately preserve Lane B as non-terminal INPUT_BLOCKED while accepting the bounded official source routes for further outcome-free materialization?
next_data_action_after_acceptance: Materialize all 98 scheduled FOMC statement records and their official minutes or transcripts; accept actual publication time for at least 94 while retaining every unresolved record.
Materialize complete 1994-2009 CPI and Employment Situation official TXT/PDF archives with per-object retrieval time and content hash, then reconcile actual release identities.
Materialize versioned OCC, SEC, CME and NYSE rule and exception evidence for all 192 rule-derived M6/M7 candidates.
Complete official XNYS exception evidence and independently accept the joined event-calendar identities before any price or outcome query.
